author: lordgrimmauld
description: Integrate with ActivityWatch to allow detailed tracking of time spent in Obsidian.

manifest.author: Grimmauld
manifest.description: This is a plugin bridging compatibility between ActivityWatch and Obsidian.
manifest.name: ActivityWatch

name: ActivityWatch

releases.author: LordGrimmauld
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: send timestamp with 'Z' timezone by @ErikBjare in https://github.com/LordGrimmauld/aw-watcher-obsidian/pull/3
* More verbose logging on failing requests to aw-server backend for when things go wrong
* Fix meaningless logging when switching to use testing mode

## New Contributors
* @ErikBjare made their first contribution in https://github.com/LordGrimmauld/aw-watcher-obsidian/pull/3

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LordGrimmauld/aw-watcher-obsidian/compare/1.2.2...1.2.3

releases.author: LordGrimmauld
releases.description:
- Fix bad ISO timestamp causing parsing errors in the aw-server-rust backend (and subsequently crashing the plugin)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LordGrimmauld/aw-watcher-obsidian/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: LordGrimmauld
releases.description:
- Added tracking of deletion, creation and renaming of files/folders in Obsidian
- Added eventTypes to ActivityWatch request payload to discern between different types of events

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LordGrimmauld/aw-watcher-obsidian/compare/1.1.0...1.2.1

releases.author: LordGrimmauld
releases.description:
preliminary event tracking to address issue https://github.com/LordGrimmauld/aw-watcher-obsidian/issues/1

- Added field "eventType" to watcher payload
- Added tracking of zero-duration delete file event [id `foss.grimmauld.aw.watcher.obsidian.deleteFileEvent`]
- Added tracking of zero-duration create file event [id `foss.grimmauld.aw.watcher.obsidian.createFileEvent`]
- Added tracking of zero-duration rename file event [id `foss.grimmauld.aw.watcher.obsidian.renameFileEvent`]
Heartbeats now have the id `foss.grimmauld.aw.watcher.obsidian.activeFileHeartbeatEvent`
This *should* be non-breaking changes.

releases.author: LordGrimmauld
releases.description: Track vault path, file path and Obsidian version

releases.author: LordGrimmauld
releases.description:
This is the first release of aw-watcher.obsidian.
Have fun :)
